heading_content_part: PRIVACYPOLICY FOR APP USERSMaineAvenue Technologies [MAT], the developer of theTransferContactsApp, with package name com.maineavtech.android.grasshopper, knowsthat you care about how your personal information is used and shared,and we take your privacy seriously. Please read the following tolearn more about our privacy practices (“Privacy Policy”).By using this application you accept the practices outlined in thisPrivacy Policy.

decoder_heading: WHAT DOES THIS PRIVACY POLICY COVER?
ident_heading:
WHAT
DOES THIS PRIVACY POLICY COVER?
heading_content_part: WHATDOES THIS PRIVACY POLICY COVER?ThisPrivacy Policy covers MAT treatment of personally identifiableinformation (“Personal Information”) thatTransferContactsgatherswhen you access or use the application. TheTransferContactsApp provides a way for users to import their contacts from an oldmobile phone into the Smartphone where the App is installed and used.No personal data is accessed unrelated with this operation.

decoder_heading: WHAT PERSONAL INFORMATION DOES Transfer Contacts COLLECT?
ident_heading:
WHAT
PERSONAL INFORMATION DOES Transfer Contacts COLLECT?
heading_content_part: WHATPERSONAL INFORMATION DOES Transfer Contacts COLLECT?Althoughwe access personal data in order to provide the service to users, weonly collect data in anonymized form—i.e., not associated withany other personally identifiable information: information regardingthe various actions and paths you take when using that App(“Events”), including a timestamp associated with eachEvent.

decoder_heading: HOW DOES Transfer Contacts USE PERSONAL INFORMATION?
ident_heading:
HOW
DOES Transfer Contacts USE PERSONAL INFORMATION?
heading_content_part: HOWDOES Transfer Contacts USE PERSONAL INFORMATION?Weonly use your Personal Information (i) in aggregate, anonymized formfor marketing purposes (e.g., to describe the total number of userswho are using Apps which use the Service), (ii) to provide theService to Users and (iii) to further develop and improve ourServices.

decoder_heading: WILL Transfer Contacts SHARE ANY OF THE PERSONAL INFORMATION IT RECEIVES?

Transfer Contacts SHARE ANY OF THE PERSONAL INFORMATION IT RECEIVES?
heading_content_part: WILLTransfer Contacts SHARE ANY OF THE PERSONAL INFORMATION IT RECEIVES?PersonalInformation about our end users is an integral part of our business.We do not rent, sell or disclose your Personal Information to anyone(including Developers) – except for the following limitedpurpose:Users:all information (including Personal Information) which is collectedthrough an App as part of the Services is made available to the Userof that App.

CONDITIONSOF USEIfyou decide to access or use theTransferContactsApp, any possible dispute over privacy is subject to this PrivacyPolicy and our Terms of Use, including limitations on damages andarbitration of disputes.

If we make changes in the way we usePersonal Information, we will notify you by changing this documentand posting on our website. Users are bound by any changes to thePrivacy Policy when he or she uses the Services (including throughany App) after such notice has been provided.QUESTIONSOR CONCERNSIfyou have any
